shortlist.rationale: Cheapest and fastest quality-gate pass. Detail is thinner than B/C/D but enough for the metadata-only refresh contract.
Best detailed shape and strong route clarity, but more than twice the wall time of A in the CLI probe.
Strong frontier low-effort shadow, but higher token footprint than A/B.
Useful conservative shadow for blocked-ref risk, but it over-blocks the known rename fixture.

decision_rule_applied: All candidates passed hard gates; quality spread was under 10 points, so cost and wall time decided the primary.
